audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands with arms crossed, watching a security monitor displaying a black-and-white surveillance feed. He occasionally shifts his stance and gestures slightly while speaking. Two other men, one in a police uniform and another in a light shirt, sit nearby, observing the monitor with focused attention. The setting appears to be an office or security room with glass walls and dim lighting, and the monitor shows a person walking through a corridor.
